Visa Checker About

About VisaPathway

VisaPathway is a free visa requirements checker designed for travelers with multiple passports and residence permits. Unlike other visa tools that only check one passport at a time, VisaPathway evaluates all your travel documents and recommends the best one for each destination.

Who Runs This

VisaPathway is built and maintained by Durga Prasad, a software engineer based in Dubai. It's part of TechTools365, a small portfolio of free, no-signup tools covering finance, travel, and SaaS.

Data Sources

  • Passport visa matrix: the open-source Passport Index Dataset as a starting point — a community-maintained baseline we treat as Tier 3 (unverified).
  • Residence permit exemptions: hand-compiled from official government immigration websites. Every entry has a source link to the issuing embassy / ministry / e-visa portal page (Tier 1 — high confidence).
  • High-traffic passport-destination pairs: automatically re-verified against gov-source URLs (Tier 2 — medium confidence). The pipeline runs hourly and re-checks any entry older than 30 days.

Each entry on the site carries a confidence badge so you know which tier the data came from. See the methodology page for the full framework.

Accuracy Disclaimer

While we strive to keep information accurate and up-to-date, visa requirements can change without notice. This tool provides general guidance only. Always verify requirements with the relevant embassy or consulate before making travel plans. We shall not be held liable for any loss or damage arising from the use of this information.

Contact

Found an error? Have a suggestion or a visa-data submission? Email us at palukuri.biz@gmail.com with the page URL, the specific claim, and an authoritative source if you have one. We re-verify and update within 24–72 hours.

For correspondence about the broader site or to learn more, visit techtools365.com.
